channel.title: Aws-S3 on Lough on Data
channel.description: Recent content in Aws-S3 on Lough on Data

item.title: Local Data Stack Planning
item.author: connor@loughondata.com (Connor Lough)
item.description: On a dog-walk conversation with Claude that surfaced a role I would have otherwise missed — and the small dlt → S3 → MotherDuck pipeline I’m building so it doesn’t happen again.

item.title: Building a Wedding Photo Collection Website with Ruby on Rails
item.author: connor@loughondata.com (Connor Lough)
item.description: A step-by-step Rails build for a wedding photo collection site — Active Storage on AWS S3, deployed to Heroku, custom domain via GoDaddy.
